values.name: res.lang.list
values.arch:
<list string="Languages" limit="200">
                    <header>
                        <button name="action_activate_langs" type="object" string="Activate"/>
                    </header>
                    <field name="name"/>
                    <field name="code" groups="base.group_no_one"/>
                    <field name="iso_code" groups="base.group_no_one"/>
                    <field name="direction" groups="base.group_no_one"/>
                    <field name="active"/>
                    <button name="%(base.action_view_base_language_install)d" string="Activate" type="action" icon="fa-check" invisible="active"/>
                    <button name="%(base.action_view_base_language_install)d" string="Update" type="action" icon="fa-refresh" invisible="not active"/>
                    <button name="action_archive" string="Disable" type="object" icon="fa-times" invisible="not active"/>
                </list>

values.name: res.lang.form
res.lang.search
values.arch:
<search string="Languages">
                    <field name="name" filter_domain="['|', '|', ('name', 'ilike', self), ('code', 'ilike', self), ('iso_code', 'ilike', self)]" string="Language"/>
                    <field name="direction"/>
                    <separator/>
                    <filter string="Active" name="active" domain="[('active', '=', True)]"/>
                </search>
